name: Skaterlag Met Andre
overview: Andre The Hilarious Hypnotist returns for his third season with the Andre The Hilarious Hypnosis show on Via TV (DSTV). Andre known for his dry whit, his unique comedian attributes and the ability to make stars out of the very people who frequent his show makes him incredibly popular. This is a 13 part Afrikaans series shot on location in South Africa

trailers.title: Trailer - Skaterlag met Andre The Hilarious Hypnotist
